english: Adds torque and power to any vehicle by adding a hybrid battery and motor. Provides modest fuel savings for gas-powered vehicles.

Fast travel currency. Used to unlock new transporters from Stronghold to the traders.

Click [decea3]Use[-] to donate one opal towards unlocking the next trader transporter.

Read more about the unlocking transporters with the [decea3]/transporters[-] chat command. See the current transporter status with [decea3]/transporters status[-].

The apocalypse took almost everything, but humanity endures. Follow the coordinates to [ff6a02]Stronghold[-]. We are a beacon of hope offering safety, shelter, and a community ready to [ff6a02]rebuild humanity[-].\n\nHere you will find a [ff6a02]hotel[-] to rest, a bustling [ff6a02]market[-], and shared spaces for [ff6a02]community crafting[-], [ff6a02]gardening[-], and [ff6a02]mining[-].

Survivor, if you are reading this, you are not alone. You are invited to [ff6a02]Stronghold[-], a sanctuary dedicated to [ff6a02]rebuilding humanity[-] in the apocalypse.

Make your way here to discover our [ff6a02]hotel[-], [ff6a02]market[-], [ff6a02]community crafting[-], [ff6a02]gardening[-], and [ff6a02]mining[-] facilities.

Reaching the settlement safely will also unlock our [ff6a02]fast travel network[-]!
Travel to the safe haven of [ff6a02]Stronghold[-].
Accept this invitation and make your way to [ff6a02]Stronghold[-] to secure your future.
I am on my way to [ff6a02]Stronghold[-].
Welcome home! You have officially joined the [ff6a02]Stronghold[-] community.

You have safely arrived at [ff6a02]Stronghold[-]!

As a new member of our community, your map has been synced to our [ff6a02]fast travel network[-]. Take these welcome supplies, grab a room at the [ff6a02]hotel[-], and explore the [ff6a02]market[-] and community areas.

Together, we will [ff6a02]rebuild humanity[-].challengeCategoryStronghold
Complete quests and defeat zombies to enable bed fast travel.
Prove your survival skills by completing 5 quests and slaying 20 zombies. Accomplishing this will grant you the permanent ability to teleport directly to your bed.
